query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Cairo
Destination: Siwa
Dates: 2026-07-16 to 2026-07-18
Budget: Cheap
Party: Friends
Interests: Backpacking, Eco Tourism

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan generally adheres to a consistent JSON structure, including top-level keys, itinerary details, budget, and landmarks. The 'cost' field is consistently a string (e.g., 'EGP 1200') which is an acceptable format for representing currency in a string field.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The 'Siwa Paradise Hotel' is located in Siwa. At EGP 1200 per night (EGP 2400 for 2 nights), it aligns with the 'Cheap' budget preference and is suitable for 'Friends'.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan's 'luxury_level' is set to 'Cheap'. Accommodation at EGP 1200/night, meals at EGP 250/meal, and activities at EGP 200 each are all very budget-friendly, making the total estimated cost of EGP 4300 for 3 days/2 nights clearly fall within a 'Cheap' budget.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Each day's activities are arranged chronologically, starting from morning/mid-day and progressing to evening meals and departure, ensuring a logical flow.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (destination, duration, budget, dates, and number of people) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: An eco-tourism and backpacking trip for friends from Cairo to the tranquil Siwa Oasis, exploring ancient sites and enjoying local cuisine.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Siwa Paradise Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Siwa and check into your accommodation, the Siwa Paradise Hotel. Take some time to settle in before heading out for lunch.

activities.title: Lunch at Tekeyet Elamir Restaurant & Café
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious local or international meal at Tekeyet Elamir Restaurant & Café, known for its Chef's Specials and vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: Explore Gebel al-Mawta (Mountain of the Dead)
activities.description: Discover the fascinating tombs carved into the rock at Gebel al-Mawta, a popular historical site offering a glimpse into ancient Siwan culture. The afternoon is the best time to visit.

activities.title: Dinner at New Star Siwa
activities.description: Savor another great meal at New Star Siwa, offering a mix of local and international cuisine with their special Chef's dishes.

activities.title: Morning Relaxation and Local Exploration
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed morning at your leisure. You might explore the immediate surroundings of your hotel or simply unwind.

activities.title: Lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات و الاكل العربي
activities.description: Indulge in a delightful lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات و الاكل العربي, known for its grilled specialties and authentic Arabic food.

activities.title: Visit the Heart of Siwa Oasis
activities.description: Spend your afternoon immersing yourself in the cultural heart of Siwa Oasis. Explore its unique palm groves, historical sites, and tranquil environment. The afternoon provides ideal conditions for a visit.

activities.title: Dinner at Siwa Gate
activities.description: Conclude your day with dinner at Siwa Gate, a restaurant offering a good selection of local and international dishes.

activities.title: Morning at Leisure
activities.description: Enjoy a final relaxed morning in Siwa. You could revisit a favorite spot, do some souvenir shopping, or simply soak in the peaceful atmosphere.

activities.title: Lunch at BEDOUIN - ROOF RESTAURENT .. مطعم بدو
activities.description: Enjoy a unique lunch experience at BEDOUIN - ROOF RESTAURENT .. مطعم بدو, offering local and international cuisine with likely great views from its roof setting.

activities.title: Early Dinner/Snack at Nacho Siwa Restaurant & Cafe
activities.description: Grab an early dinner or a substantial snack before your departure at Nacho Siwa Restaurant & Cafe, known for its high rating and specialties.

activities.title: Departure from Siwa
activities.description: Check out from your hotel and begin your journey back home, carrying memories of the serene Siwa Oasis.

budget_breakdown: Accommodation: EGP 2400 (2 nights at Siwa Paradise Hotel)
Food: EGP 1500 (6 meals at EGP 250 each)
Flights/Transport: Varies by mode of transport

landmarks.title: Gebel al-Mawta
landmarks.description: The Mountain of the Dead, an ancient burial site.

landmarks.title: Tekeyet Elamir Restaurant & Café
landmarks.description: A restaurant offering local and international cuisine.

landmarks.title: New Star Siwa
landmarks.description: Another dining option for local and international dishes.

landmarks.title: Siwa Oasis
landmarks.description: The cultural heart of Siwa, known for its palm groves and tranquility.

landmarks.title: مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات و الاكل العربي
landmarks.description: A restaurant specializing in grilled and Arabic food.

landmarks.title: Siwa Gate
landmarks.description: A restaurant serving local and international cuisine.

landmarks.title: Nacho Siwa Restaurant & Cafe
landmarks.description: A highly-rated restaurant and cafe in Siwa.
